notes: Vanilla install, no tweaks or settings changes. Performance is a bit worse than running on Windows which isn't great either. Cutscenes and transition videos are black screens. Those can be skipped by pressing escape. The inventory panel had a black screen display issue after around an hour of play. Overall the game is playable, but the performance is annoying. The game crashed on exit with a D3D11 error but that didn't appear to affect the save.
title: The Bard's Tale IV: Barrows Deep

notes:
Videos are still black but the game is actually playable now.


The game does require some time in all of the assets even after the initial loading screen but after a good minute or so of single digit frame rate it seems to stay stable at 60 for me.
Every time a new asset has to be loaded in (like when you explode a pathway for the first time and the explosion has to be loaded) there is that mini freeze for a second but after that the game seems to run quite smoothly.


Perhaps the black video issue can be fixed by installing the proper windows video codecs but I couldn't figure it out at least
title: The Bard's Tale IV: Barrows Deep
